headline: MARKET WRAP — Jun 14
telegramText: Weekend brief — tradfi data reflects Fri 2026-06-12 close. Crypto data is live. MARKET WRAP — Jun 14, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Industrial metals and semiconductor momentum defined today's session as markets embraced a clear commodities rotation theme. The collapse in volatility signaled reduced hedging demand while tech leadership remained intact despite broadening into materials. Tomorrow's setup favors continuation of the industrial commodity theme with energy potentially catching up to the broader rotation. CLOSING PRICES SPY +2.2% | QQQ +4.0% | VIX -9.1% | TLT +1.0% | DXY -0.1% | OIL -3.2% vs MORNING SPY -1.7% | QQQ -3.4% | TLT -1.3% EVENING NEWS ▲ Ayyoub Bouaddi shines in World Cup debut for Morocco ▲ Vinicius Jr. named Man of the Match after dismantling Monaco with a goal and three assists ▲ Kraken becomes first crypto exchange to sponsor the FIFA World Cup as Brazil and Morocco kick off Group C ▼ Far-right activist Tommy Robinson detained under terrorism legislation ▲ SpaceX posts $5B loss in 2025, surges past $2T valuation SCENARIO SHIFTS ↑ Late Cycle · ↓↓ Recession · ↑ Goldilocks · ↓↓ Stagflation · ↑ Displacement REGIME CHECK Risk Gauge: 76.3/100 (High). Phase: EXPANSION. SECTOR CLOSE Top sectors: COPX +11.0%, SMH +8.6%, URA +7.5%, XLE -1.2%. Sector dispersion: 49 (HIGH, breadth BROAD_STRENGTH), 88% positive 1w.
